David Reed MP
Exmouth & Exeter East

David Reed

Member of Parliament for Exmouth & Exeter East

I have the honour of being your MP for Exmouth and Exeter East. As a former Royal Marines Commando, public service remains a cornerstone of my life. Here you can find out more about my work and campaigns, how to get in touch and how to get involved with supporting your local area.

Sign up to my newsletter!

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Am I your MP?

Parliamentary protocol means David can only assist people who live in the Exmouth and Exeter East constituency. If you’re unsure who your MP is, please use the button below to check.

Find out who is your MP

Find out what I have been up to across Exmouth and Exeter East

https://www.davidreed.uk/map-locations

David Reed Member of Parliament for Exmouth & Exeter East
